trivia: The rarest current Airbus widebody: the short-fuselage A330neo found almost no buyers, making every -800 airframe a collector's event. Fewer than a couple dozen exist.
It pairs the -200 body with new Trent 7000 engines and the neo's curved sharklet wingtips.
funFacts: One of the smallest order books of any modern Airbus.
Kuwait Airways and Uganda Airlines were among its first operators.
